folio.label: 143v
folio.l: For thougú I telle nougút , his ¸pre name
Men shuln wel knowe , that it is the same
By signes , and by othere circumstaunces
Thus quyte I folk , that doon vs displesaunces
Thus spitte I out my venym , vnder hewe
Of holynesse , to semen holy and trewe
But shortly , myn entente I wol deuyse
I preche of no thyngö , but for coueytise
Therfore my teme is ©et , and euäe was
Radix malorum , est cupiditas
¢ Thus can I päche , a geyn that same vice
Whicú that I vse , and that is Auarice
But thougú my self , begilty in that synne
ñet kan I maken , othere folk to wynneto twynnetotwynneto twynne102A space marker separates these two words.MP
From Auarice , and sore to repente
But that is nat , my péncipal entente
I preche no thyngö , but for coueitise
Of this matere , it ougúte I now suffise
¢ Thanne telle I he~ , ensaumples many oon

note.notetxt: 107 Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Of olde stories , longe tyme a goon
For lewede peeple , louen tales olde
Swicú thynges konne they , wel reporte & holde
What trowe ©e , that whiles I may preche
And wynne gold and siluer , for I teche
That I wol lyue , in pouätee wilfully
Nay nay , I thougút it neuäe trewely
For I wol päche , and begge in sondry londes
I wol nougút do no labour , witú myne hondes
Ne make baskettes , and lyue ther by
By cause , I wol nat beggen Ydelly
I wol noone of the Apostles , countrefete
I wol haue moneye , wolle , Chese and whete
Al wererwerewerer Double check the r/ODR/it ©euen , of the poorest page
Or of the poorest wydewe , in a village
Al shulde hire children sterue , for famyne
Nay I wol drynke licour , of the vyne
And haue a ioly wenche , in euäy toun
But herkenetú lordynges , in conclusioun
ñoure likyngö is , that I shal telle a tale
Now haue I dronke , a draugúte of corny Ale
By god I hope , I shal ©ow telle a thyngö
That shal by resou~ , ben at ©oure likyngö
For thougú my self , be a ful vicious man
A moral tale , ©et I ©ow telle can
Whicú I am wont to päche , for to wynne
Now holde ©oure pees , my tale I wol bigynne
